name: Interview — Dual Subject
summary: Two-person conversation cut at a high tempo, bouncing between speakers with reframes so a single or dual source reads as a multi-cam shoot.

pacing.note: Cut to whoever is speaking; add reaction shots of the listener.

source_layout.shot: two singles or a wide cropped into singles

reframe.method: AE.ADBE Motion (crop+scale to isolate each speaker from a wide)
reframe.pattern: Speaker A single / Speaker B single / occasional two-shot for emphasis.
reframe.purpose: Manufacture singles + reactions from limited angles.

transitions.philosophy: Choose the transition that fits the moment; never default to a hard cut.
transitions.notes: Speaker-to-speaker changes are covered by the framing change; soften with 2-3f dissolve where motion is jarring.

color.approach: match both subjects to one look

audio.note: Lead picture changes with audio using L-cuts for natural back-and-forth.

titles_graphics.lower_thirds: name+role for each speaker on first line

generator_rules: Diarize speakers; assign picture to the active speaker.
Cut in listener reactions on emphatic lines.
Cover every speaker switch with a distinct frame, not an identical jump.
Match grade across the two subjects.
